      -------------------------------------------------------------------
                        STM32CubeProgrammer v2.22.0
      -------------------------------------------------------------------

ST-LINK SN  : 002D003D3438511434343935
ST-LINK FW  : V2J37M27
Board       : --
Voltage     : 3.24V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x435
Revision ID : Rev Y
Device name : STM32L4x6
Flash size  : 512 KBytes (default)
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M4
BL Version  : 0x90
